untranslatable_reason: Signal requires intraday time-of-day pattern recognition (W-pattern: high open → drop → modest midday increase → fall → close increase) and comparison against normal volume for specific intraday times. The allowed indicators do not include intraday time-of-day segmentation, hourly volume patterns, or baseline volume by time-of-session. vol_ratio_20 and hvol_20 are daily/bar-level aggregates and cannot distinguish opening vs closing hour volume patterns.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires intraday time segmentation and historical baseline volumes by time-of-day, which cannot be expressed using only bar-level indicators. A proper implementation would need custom indicators like 'intraday_vol_vs_avg_at_open', 'intraday_vol_vs_avg_at_close', and 'time_of_day_bucket' to compare current volume against the normal W-pattern distribution throughout the session.
